prompt: In this mixed flop spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Check keeps your line stable when purpose is uncertain.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Checking fits the track cue set, so the line keeps the pot controlled when the pressure edge is not strong enough to fire.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Check is right here because the mixed line should stay stable until the flop cues clearly justify betting.
